It's gonna fall under this available units bucket.
If tomorrow unit 123 is gone from the property website, we're gonna assume that somebody put in an application on that unit.
If after seven days, that unit does not reappear on the property website, meaning there wasn't a cancellation or denial, we're gonna move that unit from applications over to leases.
So that's the process there.

Um I would let you know we went with the seven day grace period because again, we, we interviewed our customer base, we found that something like 98% of, of app applications are processed within seven days.
